overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring an ancient Egyptian harbor at sunset. The character walks along wooden docks and stone pathways past sailing ships, palm trees, and Greco-Egyptian buildings with timber framing, while occasional NPCs walk through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient harbor dock with wooden piers and moored ships

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock, observing the sailing ships and harbor structures

entered.detail: large ancient Mediterranean sailing vessel with curved hull and square sail moored at the dock
weathered wooden pier extending over the water
two-story stone building with timber framing and red awnings
group of palm trees near the waterfront buildings
rocky desert mountains and cliffs in the distance across the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a golden-hour harbor scene with the camera walking along wooden docks. A large trireme ship is moored prominently in the center, while Greco-Egyptian stone buildings with timber framing line the right side. The warm sunset light casts long shadows across the weathered planks.

scene_state.functional_zone: water-level view of harbor edge and dock supports

events.description: camera lowers to water level, showing reflections and dock structure from below
sun reflection on water surface becomes prominent as camera angle shifts

agents.ego_description: crouching down to examine the water and dock structure at water level

entered.detail: calm harbor water with golden reflections of the setting sun
wooden pilings and supports beneath the dock structure
metal fire basket with burning coals on the dock edge

segments.scene_description: The camera dips down to water level, providing a low-angle view of the harbor. The wooden dock supports are visible in the foreground, while the water surface reflects the golden sunset. A burning brazier sits on the dock edge, and the trireme ship now appears smaller in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with cargo storage and timber-framed buildings

events.description: rising from water level back to walking height, transitioning to stone pavement
turning left along the waterfront path toward the buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone waterfront path, passing stacks of logs and cargo

notable_agents.action: NPC in dark robes walking along the dock toward the camera
NPC standing near the building entrance observing the harbor

entered.detail: large stacks of cut timber logs for ship repair or construction
cobblestone and flagstone walkway along the waterfront
stone building with exposed wooden beams and staircase leading to upper level
wooden crates and sacks of goods stacked on the dock

segments.scene_description: The camera rises back to walking level and continues along a stone-paved waterfront promenade. Stacks of timber logs and cargo crates line the path, while NPCs in period clothing walk through the scene. The architecture features traditional Greco-Egyptian timber-framed buildings with exterior staircases.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cargo dock area with large storage vessels and market stalls

events.description: child NPC runs across the path from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront, approaching larger ships and cargo storage areas

notable_agents.action: child NPC running quickly across the dock path

entered.detail: large terracotta storage vessels for wine or grain stacked near the dock
large merchant vessel with furled sails tied to the dock
wooden stall with canvas canopy selling goods
thick nautical ropes coiled on the stone pavement

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows an open cargo dock area with large amphora storage jars in the foreground and a massive moored cargo ship dominating the center. A child runs across the path, and canvas market stalls are visible along the right side. The camera continues walking past rope coils and cargo as the sun sets over the desert cliffs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling ancient harbor that transitions from the wooden docks of a mooring area to an open cargo waterfront at sunset. It begins by walking along weathered wooden planks beside a prominent trireme ship and timber-framed Greco-Egyptian buildings bathed in warm golden light. As the camera dips down to water level, the view shifts to the reflections of the sunset on the harbor surface and the supports of the docks before rising back to a stone-paved promenade. The scene then expands past stacks of timber logs and NPCs in period clothing, moving through an area of exterior staircases and traditional architecture. Finally, the camera glides into an open cargo dock filled with amphora jars and canvas market stalls, passing a massive moored cargo ship as the sun sets over distant desert cliffs.
